treatment_timeline.event: Initial outpatient treatment with Keflex and Bactrim started.
Patient followed up and underwent ultrasound revealing no drainable collection.
Patient presented to the ED with persistent cellulitis.
Patient was treated with IV vancomycin and observed overnight.
Discharged from the ED with a 14-day course of doxycycline and Bactrim.
Admitted for failed outpatient treatment of cellulitis.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Outpatient lab work for monitoring while on antibiotics.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expectation of resolution of cellulitis with appropriate antibiotic treatment.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reported overall improvement in symptoms and expressed satisfaction with the care received.
